name: 2026-06-06 Filipino Empowerment Brigada Eskwela Photo Op TH
description:
Brigada Eskwela cleaned classrooms last week. The country is still short over 144,000 of them.

Classes open Monday.

Kailan pa ba?

Cleanup is not construction. A reading nook is not a roof. A photo op is not a school plan.

A backlog older than most kindergartners is not a one-week fix.

custom_fields.value:
Brigada Eskwela cleaned classrooms last week. The country is still short over 144,000 of them.

Classes open Monday.

Kailan pa ba?

Cleanup is not construction. A reading nook is not a roof. A photo op is not a school plan.

A backlog older than most kindergartners is not a one-week fix.

Brigada Eskwela cleaned classrooms last week. The country is still short over 144,000 of them.

Classes open Monday.

Kailan pa ba?

Cleanup is not construction. A reading nook is not a roof. A photo op is not a school plan.

A backlog older than most kindergartners is not a one-week fix.

School Year 2026-2027 opens Monday June 8, 2026. Brigada Eskwela 2026 NCR kickoff at Kapitbahayan Elementary School in Navotas earlier this week (Manila Times 2026-06-02 / 2026-06-03, Tribune, PNA, DZRH, Inquirer, GMA): the President personally inspected, led a storytelling session, and ordered DepEd to ensure readiness; about 243,000 TUPAD workers deployed for cleaning. Underlying structural facts: enrollment projected at 28M (DepEd / GMA); classroom backlog more than 144,000 (commonly cited 144,000-165,000) per Manila Bulletin, Inquirer, Teachers Click; DepEd hiring over 32,000 teachers in 2026 (Inquirer 2150164, 2150379); DepEd target 20,000 new classrooms in 2026 with about 9,000 expected to be completed this year (Teachers Click).
